_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of Bloom's Taxonomy learning levels
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data catalog platform capabilities, including automated metadata harvesting, lineage visualization, search and discovery, classification, and glossary linkage.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. Knowledge DQ-K-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-004 (DG, cosine: 0.486), DQ-K-012 (DQ, cosine: 0.465).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.2/10 (raw 0.218). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. NICE-only terms [bloom, learning, levels, s, taxonomy] vs WIDAI-only terms [automated, capabilities, catalog, classification, data, discovery] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.859 (P=0.874, R=0.845). P exceeds R by 0.028 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Knowledge of Bloom's Taxonomy learning levels" and "Knowledge of data catalog platform capabilities, including automated metadata ha" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.510 > STS 0.218 (gap +0.293). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.7%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. NICE-only: [bloom, learning, levels, s, taxonomy]. WIDAI-only: [automated, capabilities, catalog, classification, data, discovery].
